creator: schoutm@gmail.com
text:
The patch to dynamically find "python" got merged upstream.  Again, will be in 2.52 but is not in current release version.

I'd prefer to stick with the short couple-lines patch I made here meanwhile since the upstream one adds a lot more changes for CI and tests.

In 2.52 we should not need any local patches as all of the issues were addressed upstream.

See: https://github.com/pgbackrest/pgbackrest/pull/2338
